entries.title: C-HR domain model (backend)
entries.description: HRM business entities, relationships, invariants. Source of truth cho Prisma schema và service logic.

entries.title: C-HR runbook
entries.description: On-call procedures, common alerts, debug commands cho cả backend và frontend C-HR.
headings: Common alerts (template — fill khi có prod)
entries.summary: > Project đang ở giai đoạn setup. Phần ops thật sẽ fill khi có môi trường staging/prod đầu tiên. Hiện chỉ ghi structure + các check local cho cả 2 app.

entries.title: C-HR deployment

entries.title: C-HR documentation index
entries.description: Single source of truth cho monorepo. Domain, ADR, plan, conventions cho cả BE và FE đều ở đây.
entries.summary: Single source of truth cho cả monorepo. Không nhân bản theo app — `apps/<name>/CLAUDE.md` chỉ là entry point trỏ về đây.

entries.title: F11 — ATS (Applicant Tracking System)
entries.description: Module tuyển dụng end-to-end — Job posting, Candidate database, Application pipeline, Interview, Offer. Tích hợp đăng tin lên TopCV / ITviec / talent.vn qua adapter pattern.
headings: Phase 4 — TopCV + ITviec (each 3 ngày khi có access)
Open questions / chốt trước khi build
Lý do chọn từng quyết định
entries.summary: > **Trạng thái**: 📋 planned. MVP scope: Phase 1 (~5–7 ngày). Phase 2 job-board push (~3–5 ngày/board). > > **Vị trí**: BE bounded context `apps/backend/src/apps/recruitment/` (mới). FE `apps/frontend/src/features/recruitment/`. Job-board adapters ở `apps/backend/src/apps/recruitment/integrations/<board>/`. > > **Routes**: `/recruitment/jobs` · `/recruitment/jobs/[slug]` · `/recruitment/candidates` · `/recruitment/candidates/[id]` · `/recruitment/applications` · `/settings/recruitment/integrations`.

entries.title: F3 — Multi-event push idempotency fix
entries.description: Tách bảng attendance_events raw, aggregate sang attendance_logs để replay IN+OUT cùng ngày trả counter đúng.
entries.summary: **Trạng thái**: 📋 edge bug, non-blocking. Ghi nhận trong [features.md §F3 edge findings](features.md#edge-findings-non-blocking-ghi-chú-để-fix-sau). **Trigger**: trước khi vào prod thật với thiết bị push 2 event/ngày (IN + OUT). **Blocked-by**: F3 ✅ done.

entries.title: F5.2 — RequestGroup form-builder UI
entries.description: Admin Org tự thêm/sửa group đơn (OT, OOO, WFH, …) qua drag-drop builder thay vì code release. Sửa fieldsSchema JSON.
entries.summary: **Trạng thái**: 📋 chưa làm. MVP đang seed cứng 3 group `leave/checkin/checkout` qua [groups.config.ts](../../apps/backend/src/apps/requests/groups.config.ts). **Trigger**: admin Org muốn thêm group "OT", "WFH", "Out-of-office" mà không cần code release. **Blocked-by**: F5 ✅ done.

entries.title: F5 — Email notifications cho Request lifecycle
entries.description: Listener nối event emit hiện có (request.<group>.created/approved/rejected/cancelled) → MailService gửi email tới requester/approver.
entries.summary: **Trạng thái**: 📋 chưa làm. Events đã emit trong F5 ([request.service.ts](../../apps/backend/src/apps/requests/request/request.service.ts)) nhưng chưa có listener. **Trigger**: yêu cầu UX cơ bản — không thể trông chờ user mở app check approval. **Blocked-by**: F5 ✅ done.

entries.title: F5 — Leave-balance entity + deduct on approve
entries.description: Cộng dồn phép theo policy + deduct khi approve leave request. Thay no-op handler trong side-effects/registry.
entries.summary: **Trạng thái**: 📋 chưa làm. Side-effect `leave` hiện no-op (xem [registry.ts](../../apps/backend/src/apps/requests/side-effects/registry.ts)). **Trigger**: business cần track quota phép. Quan trọng cho compliance. **Blocked-by**: F5 ✅ done.

entries.title: F5 — Sidebar pending-count badge
entries.description: Hiển thị số đơn cần duyệt cạnh menu "Requests" trong sidebar. BE đã có endpoint, FE polling + render badge.
entries.summary: **Trạng thái**: 📋 chưa làm. BE [`request.repository.countPendingByApprover`](../../apps/backend/src/apps/requests/request/request.repository.ts) đã có; FE chưa nối. **Trigger**: nhỏ — UX polish. ~½ ngày. **Blocked-by**: F5 ✅ done.

entries.title: F5 — Resizable master-detail panel cho /requests
entries.description: Drag-to-resize giữa list trái và preview phải. Fix type mismatch react-resizable-panels.
headings: Option B — Bỏ qua nếu lib bug
entries.summary: **Trạng thái**: 📋 small polish. Defer ghi nhận trong [features.md F5 defers](features.md#defers-f52--future). **Trigger**: UX — list dài + preview wide đôi khi muốn user kéo phân chia. ~½ ngày. **Blocked-by**: F5 ✅ done.

entries.title: F6.3 — Mention picker @user + notifications
entries.description: Tiptap mention extension + user search endpoint + notification khi được mention. V1 chỉ in-app (toast); email mention defer.
entries.summary: **Trạng thái**: 📋 chưa làm. F6 hiện store `mentions: [{userId, name}]` snapshot từ FE nhưng không có picker UI hay notification. **Trigger**: user comment muốn ping cụ thể đồng nghiệp. **Blocked-by**: F6 ✅ done.

entries.title: F6.4 — Comment moderation (HRM appadmin xoá comment người khác)
entries.description: Expose flag allowModeration đã có ở CommentService.softDelete qua endpoint + button UI cho HRM appadmin.
entries.summary: **Trạng thái**: 📋 chưa làm. Service đã sẵn flag, FE chưa expose. **Trigger**: comment toxic/sensitive cần HR xoá. Ít gặp nhưng cần có. **Blocked-by**: F6 ✅ done.

entries.title: F6.5 — Comment rollout sang Event / Employee / Department
entries.description: Mở rộng comment endpoint pilot Request sang 3 object khác. Pattern lặp — copy controller method + ACL inline.
entries.summary: **Trạng thái**: 📋 partial. Event đã có **Activity** wire-in (5 chỗ trong [event.service.ts](../../apps/backend/src/apps/calendar/event/event.service.ts)) nhưng **chưa có Comment endpoint**. Employee/Department chưa có cả 2. **Trigger**: user note hồ sơ HR, manager note phòng ban, comment trên event. **Blocked-by**: F6 ✅ done.

entries.title: F6.6 — Activity feed dashboard cho HRM appadmin
entries.description: Trang /activities cho HR xem stream toàn Org filter theo action / user / time range. Tận dụng index có sẵn.
entries.summary: **Trạng thái**: 📋 chưa làm. Activity log đã có từ F6, index `(organizationId, createdAt DESC)` có sẵn. **Trigger**: HR muốn xem nhanh "Hôm qua công ty làm gì" mà không click vào từng record. **Blocked-by**: F6 ✅ done.

entries.title: F7.4 — External calendar sync (Google + Microsoft, 1-way pull)
entries.description: OAuth connect + cron pull lịch external về overlay vào C-HR. Phase cuối F7. 1 model + 2 service provider + scheduler + 4 endpoint OAuth.
entries.summary: **Trạng thái**: 📋 chưa làm. Là phase cuối còn thiếu của F7. **Trigger**: user thật cần overlay lịch Google/Outlook lên C-HR. Không làm trước khi user yêu cầu. **Blocked-by**: F7.1 (event schema) ✅ done. **Decision D6** (đã chốt từ [features.md §F7](features.md#feature-7--calendar--booking)): 1-way pull v1, 2-way push deferred → [f7-6-2way-sync.md](roadmap.md#f76).

entries.title: F7.5 — Tasks ("Việc cần làm") tab trên calendar
entries.description: Tab thứ 2 trên header calendar bên cạnh "Sự kiện". Tạo Task entity riêng (không reuse Request) vì lifecycle khác.
entries.summary: **Trạng thái**: 📋 chưa làm. Tab "Việc cần làm" có trong screenshot F7 nhưng defer khi build MVP. **Decision**: tạo `Task` entity riêng (KHÔNG reuse Request engine — lifecycle TODO/IN_PROGRESS/DONE không match PENDING/APPROVED/REJECTED, không cần approver). **Blocked-by**: F7 ✅ done.

entries.title: F7 — Event recurrence (RRULE)
entries.description: Event lặp daily/weekly/monthly với RFC 5545 RRULE. Schema thêm 2 field, expand instances trong query range, override single instance qua parent-child.
entries.summary: **Trạng thái**: 📋 chưa làm. Schema [comment line 460](../../apps/backend/prisma/schema.prisma) ghi rõ "MVP: single events only". **Trigger**: user có meeting weekly/standup/monthly review. **Blocked-by**: F7.1 ✅ done.

entries.title: C-HR features plan
entries.description: Queue tính năng HRM theo bounded context. Bắt đầu sau khi refactor.md done.
headings: F3 verify checklist (đã chạy 2026-05-04 qua curl, BE :8000 + DB Docker)
Edge findings (non-blocking, ghi chú để fix sau)
Manual UI smoke (chờ demo qua browser)
Cao — đáng làm sớm (mỗi mục có plan riêng)
Trung bình — khi mở rộng (mỗi mục có plan riêng)
Feature 2 — HRM core: Department + Employee + OrgChart
Feature 3 — Attendance: WorkSchedule + Device + Log + Timesheet UI
Open decisions (cần chốt trước khi code)
Layout reference (theo screenshot user cung cấp)
Open decisions for F7 (cần chốt trước khi code)
entries.summary: Plan tính năng HRM, **sau** khi xong [refactor.md](refactor.md) (Phase 1+2+3 + Phase 4 docs/MCP unification — root scaffolding, identity, docs gộp ra root, infra Docker chạy, Prisma migrate `_init` áp dụng).

entries.title: F10 — Onboarding (Template + Plan + Task lifecycle)
entries.description: Quy trình onboarding nhân sự mới — HR khai báo template, hệ thống auto-spawn plan khi tạo Employee, task được giao + theo dõi qua F6 timeline.
entries.summary: > **Trạng thái**: Phase 1-4 — ✅ done (commit `5cdc2f5`). Phase 5 (polish) — ✅ done. > > **Vị trí**: BE bounded context `apps/backend/src/apps/onboarding/`. FE `apps/frontend/src/features/onboarding/`. > > **Routes**: `/onboarding` (list plans) · `/onboarding/[planId]` (HR/manager view) · `/my-onboarding` (self-service, new hire) · `/settings/onboarding-templates` (admin).

entries.title: C-HR refactor plan
entries.description: 3-phase refactor để gộp 2 boilerplate ban đầu thành 1 monorepo C-HR có doc/MCP thống nhất.
headings: Phase 1 — Root scaffolding (combine 2 boilerplate ra ngoài)
entries.summary: **Project**: C-HR (C-OpenAI Human Resource) — SaaS quản lý nhân sự cho doanh nghiệp. **Stack**: Next.js 16 (frontend) + NestJS 10 (backend) + Postgres 16 + Redis 7, monorepo.

entries.title: Roadmap — 17 mục post-MVP chưa scope chi tiết
entries.description: Các tính năng mức "Thấp" trong gap analysis 2026-05-10. 1-liner scope + trigger + dependency. Lên plan chi tiết khi nào commit work.
headings: Multi-step approval workflow cho leave > N ngày {#multi-step}
Quy trình promote 1 mục từ roadmap → plan riêng
entries.summary: Liệt kê các tính năng đã ghi nhận trong [features.md "Gap còn lại"](features.md#gap-còn-lại-sau-sync-2026-05-10) **mức Thấp** — chưa cần plan chi tiết, chỉ note scope/trigger/dep để khi business confirm sẽ promote thành plan file riêng.

entries.title: Pending verification — F1 + F2 runtime checks
entries.description: Items shipped without runtime verification yet. Walk through these in a browser + Prisma Studio after `./scripts/dev.sh start:dev` + migrate + seed.
entries.summary: Backlog of things shipped through commits since 2026-05-04 that have **only** been verified at compile time (`pnpm build` / `pnpm typecheck`). Each entry gives the smallest set of clicks / curl calls that prove the path works end-to-end.

entries.title: F8 — Work app (Project + Task)
entries.description: Quản lý dự án + task cho team. Project + Member + Task + Section + Tag generic. Phase 1A (Tag) + 1B (Project) đã đóng; Phase 2–6 là MVP demo bán hàng (~9–13 ngày).
entries.summary: > **Trạng thái**: Phase 1A (Tag generic) + Phase 1B (Project foundation) — ✅ done. Phase 2 (Task) → Phase 6 (Reports) — 📋 planned. > > **Vị trí**: BE bounded context `apps/backend/src/apps/work/`. FE `apps/frontend/src/features/work/`. Tag generic ở `apps/collaboration/tag/` + `features/tags/`. > > **Routes**: `/projects` (list) · `/projects/[slug]` (detail) · `/my-tasks` (Phase 5) · `/settings/tags` (admin library).

entries.title: ZK-Bridge — pull-side adapter for ZKTeco / Hikvision attendance devices
entries.description: Sống trong monorepo (services/zk-bridge), nhưng *deploy tách rời* tại LAN văn phòng khách hàng. Polls device qua TCP/SDK, dịch sang generic JSON contract, push vào C-HR backend ở cloud.
headings: Tại sao trong monorepo nhưng deploy tách rời
Defer cho phiên bản tiếp theo
entries.summary: > **Trạng thái**: Defer sang sau khi F1–F5 đóng + có khách hàng thật cần tích hợp device. Trước đó **không** code. > > **Vị trí**: `services/zk-bridge/` (monorepo) nhưng deploy **độc lập** tại văn phòng khách hàng — không chạy cùng C-HR backend.

entries.title: ADR 0001: <decision title>
entries.description: Template for project architecture decision records.
entries.summary: > **Template** — copy to a new file (e.g. `0002-use-graphql.md`) and replace.

entries.title: ADR 0001: Tenant isolation via manual repository pattern
entries.description: Mỗi truy vấn data của Org tự thêm filter organizationId trong repository per-service, không dùng Prisma extension auto-filter.
entries.summary: - **Status**: Accepted - **Date**: 2026-05-03 - **Deciders**: @nguyendinhphongdx

entries.title: ADR 0002: Audit log via @Auditable interceptor
entries.description: Cấu trúc audit_logs, scope các action cần ghi, retention.
entries.summary: - **Status**: Accepted - **Date**: 2026-05-03 - **Deciders**: @nguyendinhphongdx

entries.title: ADR 0003: No permission engine — code if/else + AppAdmin model
entries.description: Không dùng RBAC decorator/permission table. Phân quyền viết if/else trong service, dựa UserType + AppAdmin record.
entries.summary: - **Status**: Accepted - **Date**: 2026-05-03 - **Deciders**: @nguyendinhphongdx

entries.title: ADR 0004: OrgChart source of truth — Department.managerId + parentId
entries.description: Department tree là single source. Manager chain query qua Postgres recursive CTE. Employee không có directManagerId.
headings: Logic suy ra "quản lý của X"
Truy vấn — Postgres recursive CTE (1 query, không N+1)
entries.summary: - **Status**: Accepted - **Date**: 2026-05-03 - **Deciders**: @nguyendinhphongdx

entries.title: ADR 0005: Backend folder structure — src/apps/<context>/<module>/
entries.description: Tách bounded contexts theo nghiệp vụ HR (core, hrm, attendance, requests, …) thay vì 1 thư mục modules/ phẳng.
entries.summary: - **Status**: Accepted - **Date**: 2026-05-03 - **Deciders**: @nguyendinhphongdx

entries.title: ADR 0006: Universal Request engine — RequestGroup + Request + side-effects
entries.description: One polymorphic table for every kind of request (leave, attendance correction, OT, OOO, …) instead of per-type tables. Validated by JSON fieldsSchema, dispatched on approve via a code-keyed registry.
entries.summary: - **Status**: Accepted (supersedes the per-type tables introduced in F4) - **Date**: 2026-05-04 - **Deciders**: @nguyendinhphongdx

entries.title: ADR 0007: Service reads from RequestContext, controllers stop threading currentUser
entries.description: Services consume the authenticated user via the AsyncLocalStorage RequestContextService instead of receiving a currentUser parameter from controllers. Repositories still take primitives explicitly. Background jobs / auth flow / CLI keep explicit params.
headings: Helper API — methods on ctx (`Org-level checks, sync`)
Helper API — standalone functions for **app admin** check (needs DB)
Conventions / lint rules to add later
entries.summary: - **Status**: Accepted - **Date**: 2026-05-04 - **Deciders**: @nguyendinhphongdx

entries.title: ADR 0008: Entity ACL pattern (BaseAcl + ambient ctx)
entries.description: How object-level permissions are expressed and consumed in C-HR. Implements ADR 0003 (no permission engine) at the entity level.
entries.summary: - **Status**: Accepted - **Date**: 2026-05-06 - **Deciders**: @phongnd - **Supersedes**: — - **Relates to**: [ADR 0003 (no permission engine)](0003-no-permission-engine.md), [ADR 0007 (services read RequestContext)](0007-service-reads-request-context.md)

entries.title: Add a CLI command
entries.description: How to register a new `pnpm cli <name>` command.
entries.summary: The CLI runner reuses the full DI graph via `CliModule`. Each command is an `@Injectable()` class implementing the `CliCommand` interface.

entries.title: Add an entity ACL
entries.description: Step-by-step recipe for adding object-level permissions (canView / canEdit / canDelete + custom flags) to a NestJS feature module. Implements ADR 0008.
entries.summary: For row-level "can the current user view / edit / delete this object?" decisions. Action-level checks ("can the user call this endpoint at all") still go through `requireAppAdmin` from [`common/auth/access.ts`](../../../apps/backend/src/common/auth/access.ts).

entries.title: Add a feature module
entries.description: Step-by-step recipe for creating a new NestJS feature module in this codebase.
entries.summary: Suppose you're adding a `post` module with CRUD over a `Post` resource.

entries.title: Auth & cookies
entries.description: How JWT + httpOnly cookies + Bearer fallback work, and how to extend.
entries.summary: ``` POST /auth/login ↳ AuthService.login() verifies credentials, signs accessToken + refreshToken ↳ Controller calls setAuthCookies(res, tokens, configService) - res.cookie('access_token', ..., { httpOnly, secure, sameSite, domain, maxAge }) - res.cookie('refresh_token', ..., { ... refresh maxAge }) ↳ Response also returns { user, accessToken, refreshToken } in body so non-cookie clients (mobile, server-to-server) can extract them. ```

entries.title: Storage providers
entries.description: Use local filesystem, S3, or GCS — the StorageProvider interface stays the same.
headings: Using the storage in a service
entries.summary: `StorageModule` chooses a provider based on `STORAGE_TYPE` env var (`local` | `s3` | `gcs`). Code consumes the abstract `StorageProvider` interface, so switching is a config change.

entries.title: Switch database engine
entries.description: Move between Postgres / MySQL / SQLite / SQL Server / MongoDB.
entries.summary: Prisma's `datasource.provider` cannot be templated via `env()` — it must be a literal. The boilerplate works around this with a small script:

entries.title: Environment variables
entries.description: Full reference of every env var the app reads, with defaults and notes.
entries.summary: All env vars are loaded by `@nestjs/config` from `.env.local` then `.env` (in that order). Inside services, **always** read via `ConfigService`, not `process.env` directly. See [conventions.md](../conventions.md#configuration).

entries.title: Global services
entries.description: Providers available everywhere via DI without module re-import.
headings: Using globals from outside the request scope
entries.summary: Anything in `libs/` is `@Global()` — once `AppModule` imports it, the providers are injectable from any feature module without re-importing.

entries.title: Architecture
entries.description: Layered structure, dependency injection, and HTTP request lifecycle.
entries.summary: The codebase has four layers, each depending only on layers above it:

entries.title: Conventions
entries.description: Naming, file organization, and concrete do/don't rules.
headings: DTO vs interface — when to use what
entries.summary: | Kind | Convention | Example | | --- | --- | --- | | File | kebab-case + role suffix | `user.service.ts`, `login.dto.ts`, `parse-uuid.pipe.ts` | | Class | PascalCase + role suffix | `UserService`, `LoginDto`, `ParseUUIDPipe` | | Interface | PascalCase, prefix `I` only for JWT-style payloads | `RequestUser`, `IJwtPayload` | | Constant | SCREAMING_SNAKE | `MAX_PAGE_SIZE` | | Enum | PascalCase, members SCREAMING_SNAKE | `UserRole.ADMIN` | | Method | camelCase, verb-first | `findById`, `issueTokens` | | Boolean | `is*` / `has*` / `should*` | `isPrivate`, `hasRequiredRole` | | Folder | kebab-case | `request-context/` |

entries.title: C-HR backend documentation
entries.description: NestJS-specific architecture, conventions, recipes, reference for the C-HR backend.
entries.summary: NestJS-specific patterns cho [apps/backend](../../apps/backend/) (layered architecture, DI, Prisma, auth flow, recipes). HRM business domain (entity, invariant) sống ở [../domain.md](../domain.md), không ở đây.

entries.title: Add a feature module
entries.description: Step-by-step recipe for adding a new feature under src/features/.
entries.summary: Suppose you're adding a `posts` feature with list/detail/create.

entries.title: Add a page (route)
entries.description: Step-by-step recipe for adding a new App Router page that delegates UI to a feature view.
entries.summary: Pages live under `src/app/`. The convention is **page = thin wrapper, view = the actual UI** — keeps routes hot-swappable.

entries.title: Auth flow
entries.description: How cookies + middleware + axios refresh interceptor + TanStack Query work together.
headings: Cross-site cookies (FE on different domain than BE)
entries.summary: ```text cookie present? browser ───────────► middleware.ts (edge) │ NO → redirect /login?next=… │ YES → continue ▼ RSC route renders │ ▼ client hydrates │ TanStack Query ▼ GET /auth/me ──► apiClient (axios, withCredentials) │ 401? │ └─► /auth/refresh (deduped) │ ok? retry original │ fail? redirect /login ▼ user data → useAuth() hook ```

entries.title: Dialog layout
entries.description: Standard layout, sizing, ordering, and footer rules for shadcn Dialogs in C-HR. Apply to every Dialog so the UI feels uniform.
entries.summary: Every Dialog in C-HR (Create, Edit, Detail) follows the same anatomy. Reference implementations: `EventCreateDialog`, `RequestCreateDialog`, `EmployeeCreateDialog`, `EditRequestDialog`, `EventDetailDialog`.

entries.title: Icons
entries.description: When to use lucide-react vs custom inline SVG vs an icon library, and how to add a new icon.
entries.summary: | Need | Use | | --- | --- | | UI icon (arrow, check, eye, settings, …) | `lucide-react` (already installed) | | Brand mark (GitHub, Google, X, Discord, Apple, …) | Add a file in [`src/components/icons/`](../../../apps/frontend/src/components/icons/) | | 15+ brand marks at once | Install `simple-icons` (see "Scaling up") |

entries.title: TanStack mutations
entries.description: Standard pattern for mutations + cache invalidation + toast feedback in C-HR.
entries.summary: Server writes go through a `useMutation` hook in the feature's `hooks/` folder. UI components only call `mutateAsync(...)` and toast.

entries.title: Theming & design tokens
entries.description: How CSS variables, dark mode, animations, and the shadcn registry hang together.
entries.summary: All design tokens live in [src/app/globals.css](../../../apps/frontend/src/app/globals.css):

entries.title: Environment variables
entries.description: Every env var the app reads, what it does, and where it's consumed.
entries.summary: All `NEXT_PUBLIC_*` vars are inlined at build time. Server-only vars (no prefix) are only available during SSR / server actions / route handlers.

entries.title: UI tokens & utilities
entries.description: Animation classes, scrollbar utility, design tokens reference.
entries.summary: Defined in [src/app/globals.css](../../../apps/frontend/src/app/globals.css).

entries.title: Architecture
entries.description: App Router layers, RSC vs Client boundaries, auth flow, request lifecycle.
headings: RSC vs Client — the cardinal rule

entries.title: Conventions
entries.description: Naming, file organization, and concrete do/don't rules.
headings: DTO vs interface — when to use what
entries.summary: | Kind | Convention | Example | | --- | --- | --- | | File (component) | PascalCase | `LoginForm.tsx`, `BrandPanel.tsx` | | File (hook) | kebab-case + `use-` or camelCase `useFoo.ts` | `use-mobile.ts`, `useAuth.ts` | | File (route) | lowercase, kebab-case folder | `app/forgot-password/page.tsx` | | File (helper) | kebab-case + `.util.ts` / `.types.ts` | `pagination.util.ts`, `user.types.ts` | | Class | PascalCase | `Pagination`, `User` | | Component | PascalCase | `function LoginForm()` | | Hook | camelCase, prefix `use` | `function useAuth()` | | Constant | SCREAMING_SNAKE | `MAX_PAGE_SIZE`, `LAST_EMAIL_KEY` | | Boolean | `is*` / `has*` / `should*` | `isLoading`, `hasSession` | | Folder | kebab-case for routes, lowercase for features | `(auth)/`, `landing/`, `auth/` |

entries.title: C-HR domain model (frontend)
entries.description: HRM user flows, route map, feature breakdown. Đối chiếu với backend domain.
entries.summary: > Outline cho UI/UX của C-HR. Source of truth domain (entities, invariants) ở [docs/domain.md](../domain.md). File này tập trung vào **user flow** và **route map** của FE.

entries.title: C-HR frontend documentation
entries.description: Next.js-specific architecture, conventions, recipes, reference + UX domain for the C-HR frontend.
entries.summary: Next.js-specific patterns cho [apps/frontend](../../apps/frontend/) (App Router, RSC vs Client, design tokens, auth flow, recipes) **plus** UX domain (route map, persona).
